title: DMW Clearance For Special Cases In Lieu of OFW Clearance. The
content: 46 Department shall issue special clearances for travel abroad for Philippine Registered 47 Ship’s conduction manned by locally employed seafarers. Likewise, it shall cover 48 seafarers who will undergo orientation and such other analogous circumstances, as a 49 requirement prior to their employment. A guideline shall be issued by the Department for 50 the implementation of this section. 51 52
